title: Draft RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Classification, Valuation & Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI mandates UCBs to maintain a minimum 5% IFR based on HFT and AFS portfolios. The requirement will now be assessed annually, easing compliance pressures.
The post Draft RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Classification, Valuation & Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
